attributes.action: Drop the duty of fuel in the current fuel crisis
attributes.additional_details: I think its self explanatory. The British public can't take much more taxation or rises in the cost of living
attributes.background: In the current climate where the working person is already taxed to the brink and struggling to make ends meet. And in a country with the highest fuel duty, the current government need to reduce the duty of fuel and other petroleum products

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674
